title: Comprehensive 18-category taxonomy
detail: Structured reference table covering architectural, security, operational, process, and compliance error categories in AI-generated code.

title: Hallucinated dependencies not covered by SoNash
detail: Slopsquatting: AI suggests non-existent packages. No npm install verification in pre-commit or pre-push hooks.

title: License compliance scanning absent
detail: No automated license scanning of npm dependencies. Document identifies as risk category.

title: 8 of 18 categories already covered
detail: Hard-coded secrets, injection/XSS, error handling, code bloat, naming, compilation, prompt injection, architectural inconsistency all have existing SoNash mitigations.

title: No severity ranking
detail: All 18 categories presented as equal. In practice secrets and injection cause more damage than naming inconsistency.
